designer.noQuiltLoaded: Design a new quilt, or open a saved one via its shared link.
designer.quiltNotFound: This quilt link doesn't match any saved design.
designer.quiltLoadError: Something went wrong loading this quilt. Please try again.
designer.saveError: Something went wrong saving your quilt. Please try again.

info.title: About this quilt designer
info.credit: These blocks were designed by Jennifer Ofenstein and other Fandom in Stitches designers.
info.license: These patterns are free for personal and NON-profit use only. Not to be used for manufacture or distribution. Sale of the patterns or quilts made from them is prohibited.
info.patternsLink: Find the full pattern list on the Fandom in Stitches – Project of Doom blog
info.squareSize: Each square in the quilt grid measures 1".
info.placeBlock: Click a block in the sidebar, then click a square in the grid to place it.
info.manipulateBlock: Hover a placed block to flip, rotate, move, recolor, or delete it.
info.paintSquare: Click an empty square to open the color picker and paint it.
info.resetHint: Use Reset to clear the whole quilt and start over.

reset.title: Reset quilt?
reset.body: This will remove every block and painted square from the quilt. This can't be undone.

notFound.body: This page doesn't exist... but this friendly ghost does.
notFound.ghostAlt: A cute ghost wearing a witch hat

attributions.title: Attributions
attributions.intro: Pod3 uses free assets made by other artists. Thank you!
attributions.author: by {{author}}
